global.description: The ad features a vibrant pink background with various icons and promotional text.
global.main_message: Promoting a sale with up to 40% off on bestsellers.

elements.label: Solid color background
elements.description: A vibrant pink background fills the entire ad space.

elements.label: CrispBox logo
elements.description: A simple, stylized logo for CrispBox, featuring minimalistic lines and shapes.

elements.label: Three icons
elements.description: Three outlined icons arranged in a row, representing products or features.

elements.label: Three icons
elements.description: Another set of three outlined icons, similar in style to the previous ones.

elements.label: Rectangular icon
elements.description: Another rectangular icon, outlined and simple in design.

elements.label: Watch now button
elements.description: A prominent button with rounded edges, inviting users to 'Watch now' in bold text.

elements.label: Body text
elements.description: A smaller text area below the button, providing additional information.

elements.label: Discount headline
elements.description: A bold headline at the bottom of the ad, announcing 'Up to 40% off'.

elements.label: Body text
elements.description: A smaller text area below the discount headline, encouraging users to shop bestsellers.

elements.label: Sale label
elements.description: A bright yellow label with the word 'SALE' in bold letters.

elements.label: UGC label
elements.description: A small label indicating User Generated Content (UGC), enhancing credibility.

elements.label: Unknown element
elements.description: An unclear element at the bottom right, possibly decorative.

elements.label: Unknown element

elements.description: The main promotional message displayed prominently at the bottom of the ad.
elements.text_content: Up to 40% off Shop bestsellers now

elements.label: Call to action
elements.description: A clear call-to-action button inviting users to 'Watch now'.

elements.label: CrispBox label
elements.description: The brand name 'CrispBox' displayed prominently at the top.

elements.label: Sale badge
elements.description: A bright yellow badge indicating a sale, adding urgency.

elements.label: UGC label
elements.description: A label indicating User Generated Content, enhancing trust.

embedding_texts.layout_text: The headline is at the top, followed by icons, with the main message and CTA at the bottom.
